name: West Virginia
why_ruby_pro: West Virginia ABCA licensing compliance built into every distributor workflow
Excise tax calculations under WV Code Chapter 60 applied on every transaction
Control-state spirits tracking with the ABCA warehouse system managed automatically
problem: ABCA reporting assembled manually from disconnected spreadsheets across multiple accounts
West Virginia Chapter 60 excise tax calculations create compliance risk on every invoice
Local option wet/dry county rules across WV's 55 counties add delivery complexity
difference: Auto-calculate West Virginia excise on spirits, wine, and beer at the line-item level
ABCA compliance reports generated from live transaction data — no manual assembly
County-level delivery rules enforced automatically so drivers never service dry territories
how_it_works: Every order tagged with WV Chapter 60 excise rates and ABCA license status
One-click ABCA reports pulled directly from actual sales and inventory records
See account health and route profitability across all West Virginia counties in real time
